about.title: A Legacy of Spiritual Wisdom
about.subtitle: Guided by Krishna's Eternal Light
about.desc1: Our journey began with a simple vision: to bring the profound clarity of Vedic Astrology to the modern world. Inspired by the timeless teachings of the Bhagavad Gita, we help you navigate life's complexities with divine insight.
about.desc2: With over 12 years of experience, we blend traditional Indian spiritual aesthetics with modern analytical precision.
